policy_meanings.LIVE_AUDIT_REQUEST_CANDIDATE_ONLY: The weak record may motivate a later live-audit target, but live audit is not run here.
policy_meanings.PARK_WITH_REASON: The weak record should be parked with explicit reason and no repair.
policy_meanings.QUESTION_PACKET_REQUIRED: The weak record needs a machine/human-facing question packet before it can be resolved or accepted.
policy_meanings.SOURCE_REF_REQUEST_REQUIRED: The weak record needs an explicit source-ref or evidence surface request.
policy_meanings.UNDER_TYPED_ACCEPTANCE_CANDIDATE: The weak record may be accepted as under-typed material only by explicit review and only while preserving C5 block status unless later unblocked.
